title: Collaborative Robotics
description: Front-end development for the Collaborative Robotics Lab. Built a specialized dashboard using React and ROS to visualize and control robotic systems in real-time.

title: DREAMs Lab Research
description: Research assistant focused on integrating proprietary conductive inks into SLA 3D printing processes to enable embedded electronics in printed parts.

title: Latis
description: Full-stack development for a medical device security tracking platform, utilizing Next.js and Postgres in a Dockerized environment.

title: Politilink
description: GPT-3 application utilizing NLP to research and draft advocacy emails to local representatives based on user ZIP codes.

title: TJ Space (CubeSat)
description: Contributed to the design and systems engineering of a small satellite (CubeSat), focusing on digital design and signal processing.

title: Band Aid Together
description: IoT-based seizure detection device using Arduino MKR Wi-Fi 1010 and Firebase for real-time emergency notifications.

title: Finance QuizzAR
description: An educational platform designed to teach financial literacy through interactive, augmented reality quizzes and gamified learning experiences.

title: Food Science NLP
description: Utilized Word2Vec NLP models to correlate sensory descriptions with chemical compounds in food, uncovering patterns in flavor science.

title: Haptic Tactics
description: A device designed to provide physical feedback in Virtual Reality environments, enhancing immersion through tactile hardware integration.

title: Teach4Charity
description: Founded a tutoring initiative that leveraged student expertise to raise over $4,000 for various charitable organizations.
